initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT home_team_goal, away_team_goal
FROM Match
JOIN League ON Match.league_id = League.id
JOIN Country ON Match.country_id = Country.id
WHERE Match.date = '2008-09-24'
  AND League.name = 'Belgian Jupiler League'
  AND Country.name = 'Belgium';
